product_overview: Axis Admin Hub is an admin control center for managing leads, clients, property inventory and contracts with an analytics dashboard. It provides a single interface for administrators and operators to perform CRUD operations, upload documents and monitor KPIs.
core_goals: Allow administrators and operators to authenticate and access a centralized admin interface
Provide a browsable inventory of properties where users can create, edit, publish and upload images for listings
Enable viewing and management of incoming leads, including filtering and status updates
Manage contracts and associated documents, with upload and metadata capture
Maintain a client directory and allow creation/edition of client records
Provide user administration for managing admin/operator accounts and roles
Present high-level KPIs and interactive charts to support operational decision-making
Expose application-level settings for administrators to view and update configuration

features.name: Admin Authentication
features.description: Authenticate administrators using email and password to access the protected admin area.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email -> Fill password -> Submit login form -> Be redirected to /admin
Navigate to /login -> Fill email with invalid format -> Fill password -> Submit login form -> See validation error for email format

features.name: Dashboard Analytics
features.description: Present KPIs and interactive charts so admins can monitor leads, conversions and property performance.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> See KPI summary for leads, conversions and active listings -> Open a lead-conversion chart -> Change date range or filter -> See chart update to reflect selected range
Navigate to /admin -> See KPI summary -> Hover or inspect a chart segment -> See tooltip or detail view for the selected metric

features.name: Property Management
features.description: Create, edit and list properties with structured details, CEP-based address lookup, image uploads and published state control.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/properties -> Start new property creation -> Fill property title, price, and category -> Fill address using CEP lookup -> Upload property images -> Toggle published status -> Save property -> See property listed in inventory
Navigate to /admin/properties -> Start new property creation -> Leave required fields empty -> Save property -> See validation errors for required fields

features.name: Lead Management
features.description: Inspect incoming leads, filter by status and update lead states to progress them through the pipeline.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/leads -> View list of leads -> Filter leads by status -> Open lead details -> Update lead status -> See lead with updated status in list
Navigate to /admin/leads -> View list of leads -> Apply multiple filters -> See filtered lead list

features.name: Contract Management
features.description: Upload and manage contract records and associated documents with metadata and status tracking.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/contracts -> View list of contracts -> Start new contract upload -> Fill contract metadata -> Upload contract document -> Save contract -> See contract listed
Navigate to /admin/contracts -> Start new contract upload -> Attempt to upload unsupported file type -> See validation error for file type

features.name: Client Directory
features.description: Maintain a directory of clients with contact and company information for operational reference.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/clients -> View client directory -> Start new client creation -> Fill client contact and company details -> Save client -> See client listed in directory
Navigate to /admin/clients -> View client directory -> Search or filter clients -> See filtered client results

features.name: User Management
features.description: Manage administrative users and operator accounts, including viewing users and updating roles/permissions.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/users -> View list of admin users -> Start editing a user -> Change role or permissions -> Save user -> See updated role reflected in the user list
Navigate to /admin/users -> Start new user creation -> Leave required fields empty -> Save user -> See validation errors for required fields

features.name: Application Settings
features.description: View and update application-wide settings used to configure behavior and preferences for the admin experience.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/settings -> View application settings -> Change a setting value -> Save settings -> See confirmation that settings were updated
Navigate to /admin/settings -> View application settings -> Attempt to save invalid value for a setting -> See validation error for the invalid input

features.name: Admin Authentication
features.description: Login with email and password using Supabase Auth

features.name: Property Management
features.description: Create, edit, and list properties with images and details
user_interactions: Fill property title, price, and category
